0_Overview: What is Swift: Modern, Safe, Fast Language by Apple
Benefits: Safe by Design — Optionals, Type Safety, Memory Safety
Benefits: Fast — Comparable to C++ in Many Benchmarks
Benefits: Modern Syntax — Expressive and Concise
Benefits: Interoperable with Objective-C
Benefits: Swift Concurrency: async/await, Actors
Benefits: Open Source — Available on Linux and Windows
Benefits: Swift Package Manager Built-in
Drawbacks: Primarily Apple Ecosystem
Drawbacks: ABI Stability Only Since Swift 5
Drawbacks: Compile Times Can Be Slow for Large Projects
Drawbacks: Server-side Swift Ecosystem is Small
Drawbacks: Frequent Language Changes in Early Versions
When to Use: iOS, macOS, watchOS, tvOS App Development
When to Use: Server-side with Vapor or Hummingbird
When to Use: System Scripting on Apple Platforms
When NOT to Use: Android, Cross-platform (use Flutter/RN), Data Science
Swift vs Objective-C: Modern Syntax, Safety, Performance
Swift vs Kotlin: iOS vs Android, Very Similar Modern Features
Swift vs Dart: Native vs Cross-platform
Swift Versions: Key Features per Version
1_Swift_Basics: Type Inference and Explicit Type Annotations
Basic Types: Int, Double, Float, Bool, String, Character
Optionals: T? — May or May Not Have a Value
Optional Binding: if let, guard let
String Methods: contains, hasPrefix, hasSuffix, split, uppercased
Control Flow: if-else, switch, for-in, while, repeat-while
switch: Pattern Matching, No Fallthrough by Default, fallthrough keyword
Labeled Statements: break label, continue label
2_Collections: Arrays: [T], append, insert, remove, contains, sorted
Sets: Set<T>, insert, remove, contains, union, intersection, subtracting
Higher-order Functions: map, filter, reduce, compactMap, flatMap
3_Functions_and_Closures: Function Syntax: func name(label param: Type) -> ReturnType
Variadic Parameters: func f(_ args: Int...)
4_OOP_and_Protocols: Structs vs Classes: Value vs Reference Types
When to Use Struct vs Class
Protocols: Blueprint of Methods and Properties
5_Memory_and_Error_Handling: Retain Cycles and How to Break Them
Capture Lists in Closures: [weak self], [unowned self]
Error Handling: throws, try, catch, try?, try!
Custom Error Types: enum MyError: Error
defer for Cleanup in Error Paths
6_Swift_Concurrency: async Functions and Calling with await
MainActor: UI Updates on Main Thread
7_iOS_Development: SwiftUI Views: View Protocol, body Property
SwiftUI Layouts: VStack, HStack, ZStack, LazyVStack, LazyHStack, Grid
SwiftUI: List, NavigationStack, TabView, Sheet, Alert
UIKit and SwiftUI Interop: UIViewRepresentable, UIViewControllerRepresentable
URLSession: Data Tasks, Download Tasks, Upload Tasks
8_Swift_Ecosystem: Popular Packages: Alamofire, Kingfisher, SnapKit, RxSwift
